diff:
diff --git a/src/preview.py b/src/preview.py
index 4d0a62b..5b4697b 100644
--- a/src/preview.py
+++ b/src/preview.py
@@ -3,4 +3,6 @@ def render_preview(text, limit):
         raise ValueError("limit must be non-negative")
     if len(text) <= limit:
         return text
-    return text[:limit] + "..."
+    if limit <= 3:
+        return text[:limit]
+    return text[:limit - 3] + "..."
